docs.title: raw_fd_ostream
docs.text:
#include "llvm/Support/raw_ostream.h"

int main() {
    std::error_code EC;

    llvm::raw_fd_ostream File("output.txt", EC, raw_fd_ostream::F_Binary);

    if (EC) {
        llvm::errs() << "Cannot open file: " << EC.message() << "\n";
        return 1;
    }

    File << "Hello, LLVM file output!\n";
    File << "This is another line.\n";

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Forwarding SSH Port
docs.text:
In WSL, find IP address with: 

ip addr show eth0 | grep inet

Forward the SSH port from WSL to Windows using netsh command in PowerShell: 

netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4 listenport=2222 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 connectport=22 connectaddress=<WSL IP>

Enable the port 2222 in Windows Firewall: 

netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="WSL SSH" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=2222

docs.title: Basic Code Block
docs.text:
example.py
def greet(name):
  """Function to greet a person."""
  return f"Hello, {name}!"
example.py
def greet(name):
  """Function to greet a person."""
  return f"Hello, {name}!"

docs.title: Tab Blocks
docs.text:
Enabled by the following configuration in mkdocs.yml:

mkdocs.yml
markdown_extensions:
  - pymdownx.tabbed:
      alternate_style: true
Plain TextUnordered ListOrdered List

This is a plain text file.

  • Item 1
  • Item 2
  • Item 3
  1. First item
  2. Second item
  3. Third item

docs.title: Sequence Diagram
docs.text:
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant System
    User->>System: Request data
    System-->>User: Send data
    User->>System: Acknowledge receipt
